/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--export-dynamic -rdynamic -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/jit_ide.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/jit_ide.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jit_ide.dir/src/core/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jit_ide.dir/src/ui/EditorUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jit_ide.dir/src/jit/JitEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jit_ide.dir/src/watcher/FileWatcher.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/jit_ide.dir/_deps/text_editor-src/TextEditor.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/jit_ide.dir/src/core/WorkspaceManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jit_ide.dir/src/system/ConsoleRedirectSession.cpp.o -o jit_ide  libimgui_lib.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a libglad_gl_core_33.a /usr/lib/libclang-cpp.so.22.1 /usr/lib/libclang.so.22.1.3 -ldl -lpthread /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libLLVM.so.22.1
